title: Adjusting the Z Value
description:
Adjusting the Z Value

Adjusting the Z value

You can adjust the conveyor Z value after the calibration is completed.

Adjusting the Z value is a function to change the work pickup height that has been determined during calibration.

In the following cases, adjust the Z value:

- To use a part that is different from the one defined during calibration.

The tool has been changed on the robot after calibration.

To adjust the Z value:

Select
	 [Tools]-[Conveyor Tracking].

Select
	 the conveyor you want to edit.

Click
	 on [Conveyor Z].

The
	 dialog shown below appears.

	Click on [Teach].

The
	 window shown below appears.

	Place a part in the robot motion range.

	Click [Jog & Teach].

The
	 [Jog & Teach panel] will appear. Click the jog buttons to move
	 the robot end effector to the pick position.

	Click the [Teach] button.
